'''raloho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharl|wharl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharl|wharl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| raloho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræleheth|ræleheth]] || [[word:rælehej|rælehej]] || [[word:rælehesh|rælehesh]] || [[word:rælehe|rælehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralolohoth|ralolohoth]] || [[word:ralolohoj|ralolohoj]] || [[word:ralolohosh|ralolohosh]] || [[word:raloloho|raloloho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralohoth|ralohoth]] || [[word:ralohoj|ralohoj]] || [[word:ralohosh|ralohosh]] || [[word:raloho|raloho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralofhoth|ralofhoth]] || [[word:ralofhoj|ralofhoj]] || [[word:ralofhosh|ralofhosh]] || [[word:ralofhof|ralofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ralohotho|ralohotho]] || [[word:ralohojo|ralohojo]] || [[word:ralohosho|ralohosho]] || [[word:ralohoko|ralohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ralohoth|ralohoth]] || [[word:ralohoj|ralohoj]] || [[word:ralohosh|ralohosh]] || [[word:raloho|raloho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ralohothol|ralohothol]] || [[word:ralohojol|ralohojol]] || [[word:ralohoshol|ralohoshol]] || [[word:ralohokol|ralohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ralohothotho|ralohothotho]] || [[word:ralohojojo|ralohojojo]] || [[word:ralohoshosho|ralohoshosho]] || [[word:ralohoko|ralohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ralohothon|ralohothon]] || [[word:ralohojon|ralohojon]] || [[word:ralohoshon|ralohoshon]] || [[word:ralohokon|ralohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ralohothoro|ralohothoro]] || [[word:ralohojoro|ralohojoro]] || [[word:ralohoshoro|ralohoshoro]] || [[word:ralohokoro|ralohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
